personal_information.name: Mubashir Ajaz
personal_information.headline: Al Engineer | LLMs, Agentic Al, Al Systems Architecture | Full-Stack Delivery & Project Leadership

summary: I'm an Al Engineer and Technical Founder with 3 to 4 years of hands on experience building production grade Al solutions, leading projects end to end, and advising clients on how to apply Al effectively. My work focuses on Al systems, not isolated models, designing architectures where LLMs, machine learning, automation, and software engineering work together to deliver measurable outcomes.
core_expertise: Large Language Models (LLMs): prompting, fine tuning, RAG pipelines
Agentic Al systems: tools, APIs, decision making, and automation
Machine Learning & Deep Learning: training, evaluation, optimization
Full Stack Engineering: deploying Al into real world products
Project & Delivery Leadership: translating business goals into execution

responsibilities: Member of the core AI team responsible for designing, building, and productionizing LLM-based features and agentic AI capabilities.
Led end-to-end AI feature delivery from requirements analysis to deployment and monitoring.
Advised clients on AI feasibility, system architecture, model selection, and scalability.
Integrated LLM solutions into secure, production-ready platforms.
Ensured model robustness, performance monitoring, and responsible AI deployment.
Managed multiple AI and software projects end-to-end, from client onboarding to production.
Served as the primary liaison between international clients and cross functional technical teams.
Led sprint planning, task prioritization, milestone tracking, and release coordination.
Developed ML/DL models for healthcare, finance, and automation solutions.
Supported data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, and deployment.
Integrated client feedback to drive product improvements and ensured agile delivery.
Assisted in the Operating Systems course, supporting students and managing academic evaluations.
Provided SEO services and technical implementation support for service based software solutions.
Proven track record of delivering results and achieving client objectives in a freelance capacity.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
education.coursework: Programming Fundamentals (PF), Object Oriented Programming (OOP), Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA), Database Systems, Numerical Computing, Probability and Statistics, Linear Algebra, Operating Systems.
